patch.value: On 2026-05-27 the daily release publish step in this repo plus all 18 peer pm-* repos failed with E404 even though provenance signing succeeded. The repo was tagged + committed at the new version but npm rejected the PUT. Replace the publish step with a resilient version: skip when version is already on npm, retry the provenance publish up to 3 times with 30s sleep, then fall back to a non-provenance publish.
Add publish retry + provenance fallback to release workflow
Replace npm publish step with retry-3x + non-provenance fallback
Release workflow auto-retries E404 publish errors and falls back to publish-without-provenance after 3 failed attempts

value.author: codex
value.text: Permanent fix for 2026-05-27 npm E404 outage

value.author: codex
value.text: Mirrors PR opened in all 19 pm-* repos

value.author: codex
value.text: Publish steps in release workflows should be idempotent and tolerant of transient registry failures
